## Type of change

- [ ] New module (`src/<module>.ts`)
- [ ] New exported type or interface
- [ ] Config change (schema + defaults + `PiCsConfig` interface)
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs / tests
- [ ] Tooling / CI

## Testing

<!-- Which test cases cover the new behavior? Note coverage for new exports. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes (typecheck + lint + tests at coverage threshold)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for all changed behavior
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Public API changes are backwards-compatible (or a breaking version bump is intended)
- [ ] Academic integrity guard not weakened (if this PR touches `src/integrity.ts`)
